blessingMessage: May Shree Maharaj bless all devotees with peace, health and prosperity.

ekadashi.title: Ekadashi Abhishek
ekadashi.desc: Early morning abhishek and spiritual discourse.

mahaAarti.title: Maha Aarti
mahaAarti.desc: Special evening aarti with bhajan and prasadam.

papmochaniEkadashi.title: Papmochani Ekadashi
papmochaniEkadashi.desc: Phalguna Krishna Ekadashi believed to cleanse past sins.

kamadaEkadashi.title: Kamada Ekadashi
kamadaEkadashi.desc: Chaitra Shukla Ekadashi observed for fulfillment of desires.

varuthiniEkadashi.title: Varuthini Ekadashi
varuthiniEkadashi.desc: Chaitra Krishna Ekadashi granting protection and spiritual growth.

mohiniEkadashi.title: Mohini Ekadashi
mohiniEkadashi.desc: Vaishakha Shukla Ekadashi associated with Vishnu's Mohini avatar.

aparaEkadashi.title: Apara Ekadashi
aparaEkadashi.desc: Vaishakha Krishna Ekadashi believed to remove accumulated sins.

kamalaEkadashiMay.title: Kamala Ekadashi (Apara Ekadashi)
kamalaEkadashiMay.desc: Observed during Adhik period, considered highly auspicious.

kamalaEkadashi.title: Kamala Ekadashi (Kamala Ekadashi)
kamalaEkadashi.desc: A highly auspicious Ekadashi observed during Adhik Maas.

nirjalaEkadashi.title: Nirjala Ekadashi
nirjalaEkadashi.desc: Jyeshtha Shukla Ekadashi observed with strict fast without water.

bhagwatEkadashi.title: Bhagwat Ekadashi (Yogini Ekadashi)
bhagwatEkadashi.desc: Ashadha Krishna Ekadashi observed for removal of sins and spiritual purification.

devshayaniEkadashi.title: Devshayani (Ashadhi) Ekadashi
devshayaniEkadashi.desc: Ashadha Shukla Ekadashi marking beginning of Chaturmas. Major Maharashtra festival.

kamikaEkadashi.title: Kamika Ekadashi
kamikaEkadashi.desc: Shravana Krishna Ekadashi dedicated to Lord Vishnu.

putradaShravanaEkadashi.title: Shravana Putrada Ekadashi
putradaShravanaEkadashi.desc: Shravana Shukla Ekadashi observed for blessings of children.

ajaEkadashi.title: Aja Ekadashi
ajaEkadashi.desc: Bhadrapada Krishna Ekadashi granting liberation from sins.

parivartiniEkadashi.title: Parivartini Ekadashi
parivartiniEkadashi.desc: Bhadrapada Shukla Ekadashi marking Vishnu's symbolic turning during Chaturmas.

indiraEkadashi.title: Indira Ekadashi
indiraEkadashi.desc: Ashwin Krishna Ekadashi observed for ancestors' peace.

papankushaEkadashi.title: Papankusha Ekadashi
papankushaEkadashi.desc: Ashwin Shukla Ekadashi dedicated to Lord Vishnu, believed to remove sins.

ramaEkadashi.title: Rama Ekadashi
ramaEkadashi.desc: Kartika Krishna Ekadashi observed for prosperity and removal of sins before Prabodhini Ekadashi.

prabodhiniEkadashi.title: Prabodhini (Kartiki) Ekadashi
prabodhiniEkadashi.desc: Kartika Shukla Ekadashi marking end of Chaturmas. Highly significant in Maharashtra.

utpannaEkadashi.title: Utpanna (Utpati) Ekadashi
utpannaEkadashi.desc: Margashirsha Krishna Ekadashi marking the origin of Ekadashi vrat.

mokshadaEkadashi.title: Mokshada Ekadashi
mokshadaEkadashi.desc: Margashirsha Shukla Ekadashi associated with Bhagavad Gita Jayanti.

aarti1.title: Maha Aarti
aarti1.desc: Special evening aarti with bhajan and prasadam.

aarti3.title: Evening Aarti
aarti3.desc: Evening devotional aarti with lamps and chants.

audio1.title: Morning Bhajan
audio1.desc: Peaceful bhajan to start the day

viral.name: Viral Devsthan
viral.desc: Shri Samarth Sadguru Dhondutatya Maharaj Sansthan, Viral

dongarshelki.name: Dongarshelki Devsthan
dongarshelki.desc: Shri Samarth Sadguru Dhondutatya Maharaj Sansthan, Alandi
dongarshelki.address: Shri Samarth Dhondutatya Mandir Dongarshelki, Udgir - 413517, Maharashtra

dehu.name: Dehu Temple
dehu.desc: Shri Samarth Sadguru Dhondutatya Maharaj Sansthan, Dehu

jeur.name: Jeur Temple
jeur.desc: Shri Samarth Sadguru Dhondutatya Maharaj Sansthan, Jeur

event1.title: Annual Yatra 2024
event1.description: Grand procession with thousands of devotees participating in the annual yatra. The event featured traditional music, bhajans, and prasad distribution.

event2.title: Maha Aarti Celebration
event2.description: Special evening aarti ceremony with devotional songs and lamp offerings. Devotees gathered to seek blessings from Shri Maharaj.

event3.title: Temple Foundation Day
event3.description: Celebration of temple foundation day with special prayers, cultural programs, and community feast for all devotees.
